result:
All 6 tests pass. There were two bugs, both in `lrucache/cache.py`:

1. **`get` didn't refresh recency** — a cache hit returned the value without moving the key to the end of the `OrderedDict`, so a just-read key could still be evicted as least-recently-used. Added `move_to_end(key)` on every non-expired hit (`cache.py:30`).

2. **`put` evicted when updating an existing key** — the eviction check ran unconditionally before insertion, so overwriting a key while at capacity wrongly dropped an unrelated LRU entry. Now it only evicts when the key is new (`cache.py:33`).

`SOLUTION.md` is written with the same explanation, and no test files were touched.
